name: foundry-clipboard-buddy
description: Paste media and contextual text from Clipboard into Tiles, Tokens, Notes, or Chat

scripts.copy: mkdir -p dist && cp ./clipboard-image.js dist/ && cp ./clipboard-image.css dist/ && cp ./README.md dist/ && cp ./TESTING.md dist/ && cp ./CHANGELOG.md dist/ && cp ./LICENSE.md dist/ && cp ./module.json dist/ && cp ./THANKS.txt dist/ && cp -R ./templates dist/
scripts.copyWin: mkdir dist && copy module.json dist && copy clipboard-image.js dist && copy clipboard-image.css dist && copy README.md dist && copy TESTING.md dist && copy CHANGELOG.md dist && copy LICENSE.md dist && copy module.json dist && copy THANKS.txt dist && xcopy templates dist\templates /E /I /Y

author: JeansenVaars (Saif Ellafi)
